'''âv-th-m''' ('''kavatham''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:allegorize|allegorize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-th-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:allegorize|allegorize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-th-m
|-
! Lemma
| kavatham
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivatham|thivatham]] || [[word:jivatham|jivatham]] || [[word:shivatham|shivatham]] || [[word:kivatham|kivatham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvatham|thuthuvatham]] || [[word:jujuvatham|jujuvatham]] || [[word:shushuvatham|shushuvatham]] || [[word:kukuvatham|kukuvatham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvatham|thuvatham]] || [[word:juvatham|juvatham]] || [[word:shuvatham|shuvatham]] || [[word:kuvatham|kuvatham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvatham|thuvatham]] || [[word:juvatham|juvatham]] || [[word:shuvatham|shuvatham]] || [[word:kuvatham|kuvatham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevatham|thevatham]] || [[word:jevatham|jevatham]] || [[word:shevatham|shevatham]] || [[word:kevatham|kevatham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovatham|thothovatham]] || [[word:jojovatham|jojovatham]] || [[word:shoshovatham|shoshovatham]] || [[word:kokovatham|kokovatham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovatham|thovatham]] || [[word:jovatham|jovatham]] || [[word:shovatham|shovatham]] || [[word:kovatham|kovatham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovatham|thovatham]] || [[word:jovatham|jovatham]] || [[word:shovatham|shovatham]] || [[word:kovatham|kovatham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvatham|thĂŠvatham]] || [[word:jĂŠvatham|jĂŠvatham]] || [[word:shĂŠvatham|shĂŠvatham]] || [[word:kĂŠvatham|kĂŠvatham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavatham|thathavatham]] || [[word:jajavatham|jajavatham]] || [[word:shashavatham|shashavatham]] || [[word:kakavatham|kakavatham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavatham|thavatham]] || [[word:javatham|javatham]] || [[word:shavatham|shavatham]] || [[word:kavatham|kavatham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavatham|thavatham]] || [[word:javatham|javatham]] || [[word:shavatham|shavatham]] || [[word:kavatham|kavatham]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavatham|shavatham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavatham|goshavatham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavatham|gokishavatham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavathamnĂŒ|shavathamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavathamnknĂŒ|goshavathamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavathamnĂŒ|gokishavathamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavathamshĂ«|shavathamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavathamnkshĂ«|goshavathamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavathamshĂ«|gokishavathamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavathamro|shavathamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavathamnkro|goshavathamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavathamro|gokishavathamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavathamu|shavathamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavathamnkmu|goshavathamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavathamu|gokishavathamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavathamsher|shavathamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavathamnksher|goshavathamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavathamsher|gokishavathamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavathamng|shavathamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavathamnkng|goshavathamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavathamng|gokishavathamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavathamya|shavathamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavathamnkya|goshavathamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavathamya|gokishavathamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavathamyam|shavathamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavathamnkyam|goshavathamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavathamyam|gokishavathamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavathamnĂŒshĂ«|shavathamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavathamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavathamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavathamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavathamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavathamnĂŒro|shavathamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavathamnknĂŒro|goshavathamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavathamnĂŒro|gokishavathamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavathamnĂŒmu|shavathamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavathamnknĂŒmu|goshavathamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavathamnĂŒmu|gokishavathamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavathamshĂ«nĂŒ|shavathamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavathamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavathamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavathamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavathamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavathamshĂ«ro|shavathamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavathamnkshĂ«ro|goshavathamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavathamshĂ«ro|gokishavathamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavathamshĂ«mu|shavathamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavathamnkshĂ«mu|goshavathamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavathamshĂ«mu|gokishavathamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavathamronĂŒ|shavathamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavathamnkronĂŒ|goshavathamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavathamronĂŒ|gokishavathamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavathamroshĂ«|shavathamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavathamnkroshĂ«|goshavathamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavathamroshĂ«|gokishavathamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavathamromu|shavathamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavathamnkromu|goshavathamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavathamromu|gokishavathamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavathamunĂŒ|shavathamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavathamnkmunĂŒ|goshavathamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavathamunĂŒ|gokishavathamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavathamushĂ«|shavathamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavathamnkmushĂ«|goshavathamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavathamushĂ«|gokishavathamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavathamuro|shavathamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavathamnkmuro|goshavathamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavathamuro|gokishavathamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
